summary_en: 26,250,100 shares acquired for ¥39,999,884,800 (0.96% of shares outstanding) from May 15–27, 2026, via open-market purchase on TSE. Board-authorized program limit: 40M shares (1.47% S/O), ¥40.0B, May 14–October 31, 2026. Program completed ahead of authorization window.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Share Acquisition (Self-Dealing under Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Mitsui Fudosan completed a self-dealing share acquisition program authorized by the board on May 13, 2026. The company acquired 26,250,100 shares for ¥39,999,884,800 through open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 15 and May 27, 2026. This represents 0.96% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The authorization permitted acquisition of up to 40 million shares (1.47% S/O) for up to ¥40.0 billion over the period May 14 to October 31, 2026. Having completed the entire acquisition program in the first two weeks of the authorization window, the company has terminated the repurchase authority effective immediately.
